title: Annotate round descriptor
description: The single persistent structured entity: <guid>-round.json (tech-requirements §5.1). Created once by the launch script as a `pending` stub; mutated only by the server thereafter. Exactly four fields and no more (§5.1).

source.description: Absolute path to the real project file the agent edits (the destination pointer), or null for an unowned live page (§5.1, §5.3).

snapshot.description: The <guid> whose snapshot this round's feedback is anchored against; null means "this round's own snapshot" (resolve as snapshot ?? own_guid). Set to a prior <guid> by the server on revert (§5.4).

status.description: Lifecycle. pending at creation -> submitted on send -> accepted; also directly pending -> accepted on accept-on-first-look (§5.1).

feedback.description: All anchor objects from the human's submit, spliced in by the server. Empty at creation.
